name: Death Education
short_description: Immerse yourself in the atmosphere of an old abandoned Soviet school and find out what's going on inside its walls from the first person in the new psychological horror Death Education. But be careful, something is already watching you.
detailed_description:
You bet your friends that you can survive the night in this terrifying place, but be warned that this bet could cost you your life.

Death Education is a first-person horror game that will send you into the dark corridors of an abandoned school, where every lesson could be your last. Explore the classrooms of an old Soviet school and uncover the dark secrets of the past before you are consumed by this gloomy educational structure. An ominous encounter with unknown forces awaits you. Can you make it through the night?
